prompt: A traditional Japanese temple courtyard. A large red wooden torii gate stands prominently ahead, framing a stone path lined with cherry blossom trees in full bloom. Pink petals scatter on the ground. A raked white gravel garden with stepping stones extends in the foreground. A moss-covered stone lantern sits to the left of the gate. A wooden temple building with a curved dark tile roof stands to the right of the gate. Misty green mountains rise in the background. Soft overcast light creates a serene atmosphere. To the right of the courtyard, a weathered wooden bell tower with a bronze temple bell stands beside a stone basin with a bamboo water dipper. Behind the viewer, a low wooden fence and a gravel path lead back toward a covered walkway with paper lanterns. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level, standing in the courtyard and facing the red torii gate ahead.

tracking_object.desc: stone lantern to the left of the torii gate
